subparts.text: Define Mode with an appropriate example. 1
Calculate Mean Deviation from Median for the following data on monthly income of households: Income 8520 6350 7920 8360 7500 3
If r= 0.8 between two variables X & Y. What does it imply? Give an example from everyday life for two such variables. 2
Calculate median from the following data: Class Frequency 10-20 15 20-30 8 30-40 17 40-50 29 50-60 7 60-70 4 5
Compute arithmetic mean of the following: Class Frequency 0-10 12 10-20 18 20-30 27 30-40 20 40-50 17 50-60 6 4

The tax authority collected the following amount of tax from different firms in a particular market. Amount of Taxes No. of firms 10 3 11 12 12 18 13 12 14 3 2 Calculate the quartile Deviation and coefficient of Quartile Deviation.

A study of 1000 companies gives the following information: Profit No. of companies 0-10 10 10-20 20 20-30 30 30-40 50 40-50 40 50-60 30 Calculate the standard deviation of the profit earned by assumed mean method. 3

Seven students of a class secured the following marks in economics and history. Calculate the coefficient of correlation with the help of given data: Economics History 66 58 90 76 89 65 55 58 58 53 44 49 42 56 4

Calculate the linear regression equation of advertisement cost on sales from the data given below: Advertisement Costs Sales 2 3 4 7 6 5 8 10 Also, depict the value of sales, if the advertisement costs go upto Rs. 10 crores 1
